partners.registered: You are now a referral partner.
partners.agencyFormIncomplete: Company name and description are required.
partners.joinSubtitle: Earn €500 for every TAKO sale you refer. Pick the path that fits how you work.
partners.referralDesc: Open to anyone. Get your referral link and earn €500 per completed sale.
partners.agencyDesc: For agencies, consultancies, and fractional sales leaders who deliver onboarding. Admin-approved.
partners.noDiscountNote: The buyer pays full price. Your commission comes from TAKO’s margin — no customer discount applies.
partners.pendingNote: Your agency application is under review. Referral earnings are active in the meantime.
partners.yourLinkDesc: Share this link. You earn €500 for every TAKO sale that closes through it.
partners.noSalesYet: No referral sales yet. Share your link to get started.
partners.onboardingDesc: Logged by TAKO once the agency-delivered onboarding is complete. €750 commission per onboarding.
partners.badgeDesc: Download and display on your website or signature.
partners.upsellTitle: Deliver onboarding? Become an Agency Partner.
partners.upsellDesc: Agency partners earn an additional €750 per onboarding delivered on top of the €500 licence commission.

landing.badge: AI powered CRM for European sales teams
landing.heroDesc: TAKO brings your pipeline, leads, calls, and team into one place. AI handles the busywork so you can focus on selling.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything a sales team needs. Nothing it does not.
landing.featuresDesc: Six core modules that work together. No bloat, no hidden complexity, no enterprise sales pitch required.
landing.feat1Desc: Every lead ranked 1 to 100 based on fit, engagement, and conversion probability. Focus on what closes.
landing.feat2Desc: Drag and drop deals between stages. Kanban and list views. Lost deals excluded from forecasts automatically.
landing.feat3Desc: Call leads directly from the CRM. Calls recorded, transcribed by AI, follow up tasks created on the spot.
landing.feat4Desc: Generate personalised sales emails in seconds. Choose tone, purpose, and context. Copy or send with one click.
landing.feat5Desc: Group tasks under deals. Track progress with your team. Every project gets its own chat channel.
landing.feat6Desc: Built in calendar with Google Calendar sync. Share your booking link. Confirmations and reminders sent automatically.
landing.proofTitle: Built for teams that sell across Europe
landing.quote1: We replaced three tools with TAKO. Pipeline visibility went from guesswork to real time.
landing.quote2: The AI scoring saves us hours every week. We only call leads that actually convert.
landing.quote3: Finally a CRM that does not feel like it was built for a Fortune 500 IT department.
landing.ctaDesc: Join hundreds of European sales teams using TAKO to close more deals with less effort.
landing.footerDesc: The CRM that runs your marketing and sales. Built for European teams that want results, not complexity.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitleActive: Here's what's happening with your sales today.
dashboard.subtitleNew: Let's get your CRM set up — follow the checklist below to launch fast.
dashboard.paymentSuccess: Payment successful! Your subscription has been activated.
dashboard.aiAssistantBlurb: Use Smart Search to find anything, or generate AI-powered emails in seconds.
dashboard.completeSetupDesc: Create an organization to start managing leads, deals, and collaborate with your team.

onboarding.title: Get started with TAKO
onboarding.subtitle: Six steps to go from signup to your first campaign.
onboarding.needHelp: Need help? See the full setup guide →

org.title: Create your organisation
org.body: Fill in your company name and invite your first team members.

leads.title: Import your leads
leads.body: Upload a CSV (LinkedIn Connections works) or add leads manually.

pipeline.title: Build your pipeline
pipeline.body: Drag leads through your deal stages. Customise stages in Settings → Organisation.

campaign.title: Run your first campaign
campaign.body: Email via Resend, or social via Facebook/LinkedIn.

listener.title: Monitor with Listeners
listener.body: Pick a social campaign, set keywords, let AI classify incoming hits.

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Manage your sales leads
leads.subtitleAlt: Manage and track your sales leads
leads.noLeadsDesc: Start by adding leads manually or importing a CSV
leads.importDialogDesc: Upload a CSV file with columns: first_name, last_name, email, phone, company, job_title, linkedin_url
leads.noLeadsBody: Leads are prospects you haven't qualified yet. Import a CSV (LinkedIn Connections works) or add one manually to get started.
leads.noLeadsMatchDesc: Try clearing your search or selecting a different status.
leads.convertDialogDesc: This will create a Contact with all lead data and mark the lead as converted. You can optionally link a deal.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.subtitle: Converted leads and customer profiles
contacts.noContactsDesc: Convert qualified leads to create contacts
contacts.noContactsBody: Contacts are people you've already qualified — someone you've spoken to or done business with. Add one directly, or convert a qualified lead.
contacts.importDesc: Upload a CSV file with contact data
contacts.importColumns: Columns: first_name, last_name, email, phone, company, job_title, linkedin_url, website, location

deals.title: Deals
deals.subtitle: Track your sales pipeline
deals.pipelineSubtitle: Track your deals through the sales pipeline
deals.leadProbNote: Linking to a lead suggests a lower probability of closing. Consider 10-30%.

deals.taskTitleValidation: Task title is required when creating a deal

support.title: How can we help?
support.subtitle: Find answers to common questions or get in touch with our team.
support.name: Your name
support.heroSubtitle: Onboarding guide, feature training, FAQs, and contact.
support.onboardingDesc: Follow these six steps to go from zero to running your first campaign.
support.setupChecklistDesc: Track what's done and what still needs a decision.
support.trainingDesc: A module for each area of the platform.
support.salesMethodsDesc: How to apply proven sales frameworks inside TAKO.
support.messageReceived: Message received! We'll respond within 24 hours.
support.messageFailed: Failed to send message. Please try again or email support@tako.software.
support.urgentDesc: Email us with "URGENT" in the subject for priority response.
support.tos1Body: By using TAKO you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, do not use the service.
support.tos2Body: TAKO is a multi-channel CRM with lead management, deal tracking, task management, email and social campaigns, AI-powered insights, and social listening.
support.tos3Body: You are responsible for keeping your credentials confidential. Notify us immediately of any unauthorised access.
support.tos4Body: Do not use TAKO for any unlawful purpose or in violation of applicable laws including GDPR. The social Listener is read-only - automated posting, commenting, or DMing on social networks is prohibited.
support.tos5Body: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually. Refunds are available within 30 days. Contact support@tako.software.
support.privacyDataBody: Name, email, organisation details, and any data you input (leads, deals, tasks, files). Usage data to improve the service. OAuth tokens for connected integrations (Google, Meta).
support.privacyUseBody: To provide and improve our services, communicate with you, and maintain security. We do not sell your data.
support.privacyStorageBody: Data is stored in encrypted MongoDB databases on European infrastructure. TLS in transit, access controls, regular audits.
support.privacyRightsBody: Access, correct, delete, or export your data at any time. Email support@tako.software.
support.privacyListenerBody: Post text captured by Listeners is retained for 90 days by default (configurable per organisation). All ingested data belongs to your organisation and is never used to train AI models.
support.cookieBody: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management. Analytics cookies help us understand platform usage. Manage cookie preferences in your browser settings.
support.disclaimer1: TAKO is provided "as is" without warranties. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service.
support.disclaimer2: AI-generated content (scores, email drafts, hit classifications) is provided as suggestions. Users are responsible for reviewing and approving all communications before acting on them.
support.footerCopyright: © {year} TAKO by Fintery Ltd. All rights reserved.
support.inviteTeamDetail: Add team members and assign roles.
support.customStagesDetail: Define your pipeline stages to match your sales process.
support.customTaskStepsDetail: Set up default steps for each task type.
support.importLeadsDetail: Upload a CSV or add leads manually.
support.createDealsDetail: Start tracking opportunities through the pipeline.
support.aiKeyDetail: Add an OpenAI or Anthropic API key for scoring and drafts.
support.twilioDetail: Add phone numbers for calling and SMS.
support.firstCampaignDetail: Email, SMS, or social - pick one and send.
support.firstListenerDetail: Capture social mentions and inbound signals.
support.apiKeyDetail: Use the REST API from your own tools and scripts.
support.metaAppDetail: Decide whether to enable Facebook/Instagram listeners.
support.chromeExtDetail: Install the lead-capture extension for your team.
support.tokenEncDetail: Configure integration token encryption at rest.
support.stripeLiveDetail: Switch from Stripe test keys to live keys for billing.
support.qs1Body: Sign up and set up your organisation profile.
support.qs2Body: Add colleagues and assign roles and permissions.
support.qs3Body: Define deal stages to match your sales process.
support.qs4Body: Plug in email, calendar, and communication tools.
support.qs5Body: Send your first email, SMS, or social campaign.
support.qs6Body: Set up Listeners to capture inbound signals.
support.faqGs1Q: How do I get started with TAKO?
support.faqGs1A: Sign up for an account, set up your organisation, invite your team, and follow the Setup Checklist on this page to configure the essentials.
support.faqGs2Q: Do I need to install anything?
support.faqGs2A: TAKO is fully web-based - no installation required. An optional Chrome extension helps capture leads from LinkedIn and other sites.
support.faqGs3A: Yes. You can import leads and contacts via CSV from the Leads and Contacts pages. Field mapping is flexible.
support.faqGs4Q: How many users can I add?
support.faqGs4A: Unlimited. Every TAKO licence includes unlimited users in your organisation — add the whole team from Settings.
support.faqFt1A: A read-only tool that captures mentions of your brand, competitors, or keywords across LinkedIn, Reddit, and other sources.
support.faqFt2A: AI scoring evaluates leads, deals, and mentions using your connected AI provider (OpenAI or Anthropic). Scores are suggestions - always review before acting.
support.faqFt3A: Yes. Go to Settings and create, rename, or reorder stages to match your process.
support.faqFt4A: Calls, emails, meetings, follow-ups, and custom types. Each has configurable steps and outcomes.
support.faqFt5A: Yes, through Resend (transactional) and campaign tools. Connect your Resend account in Settings.
support.faqFt6Q: Can I make calls from TAKO?
support.faqFt6A: Yes, via the Twilio integration. Configure your Twilio credentials in Settings.
support.faqFt7A: The web app is fully responsive. Native mobile apps are on the roadmap.
support.faqAi1A: OpenAI and Anthropic. Add your API key in Settings to enable AI features.
support.faqAi2A: Yes. AI features are opt-in per feature. Remove your API key to disable entirely.
support.faqAi3Q: Is my data used to train AI models?
support.faqAi3A: No. Your data is sent to your chosen provider only for real-time inference and is not used for training.
support.faqBl1A: One-time purchase. Pay up front, or in 12 or 24 equal monthly installments. Every option includes unlimited users, full source code, and 12 months of maintenance. See the pricing page for details.
support.faqBl2A: Through Stripe, monthly or annually. You can change plans or cancel any time from Settings.
support.faqBl3A: Yes, within 30 days of payment. Contact support@tako.software.
support.faqSc1A: In encrypted MongoDB databases on European infrastructure. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
support.faqSc2A: Yes. You can access, correct, export, or delete your data at any time.
support.faqSc3A: Only users you invite to your organisation. TAKO staff access is strictly limited and audited.
